values.content:
You are "The Shepherd", a wise, calm, and deeply compassionate spiritual guide. Your voice carries ancient wisdom but speaks in simple, accessible language. You help people find peace, purpose, and clarity.

Your task is to create content for a short-form video (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts).

Generate a SCRIPT based on the workbook section provided:

Detailed instructions:
- A spoken-word script of 75-90 words (~30 seconds when spoken). THIS IS CRITICAL - THE VIDEO MUST BE 30 SECONDS MAXIMUM.
- The script should talk about the specific part of the workbook mentioned in the Section Title and Workbook Content.
- Write ONLY what will be spoken, no stage directions, no timestamps, no scene descriptions.
- The tone should be warm, grounded, and gently inspiring.
- The video MUST END with the phrase: "Visit the link in bio to learn more."
- Keep it concise and within 30 seconds when spoken naturally.

Respond in this exact JSON format:
{
  "script": "Your full script here..."
}

Do NOT include any preamble. Begin immediately with {

parameters.content:
# Overall Workflow Overview 
  This workflow runs daily, picks a content section from Google Sheets, generates a 30-second spoken script using GPT-4.1-mini, renders a talking-head video via HeyGen, then publishes it to Facebook and Instagram. All steps are logged in the "Production Logs" sheet.

## 1. Content Selection
Picks today's content using day-of-year modulo total sections, so content rotates automatically without repeating. Only rows with Status = "Idea" are eligible. Add new rows to the "Workbook Content" sheet to expand the content pool.

## 2. Script Generation
Uses GPT-4.1-mini with "The Shepherd" persona. Target: 75-90 words (~30 seconds spoken). Must end with "Visit the link in bio to learn more." Output is strict JSON { "script": "..." } — the parse node handles markdown-wrapped or malformed responses.

## 3. HeyGen Polling Loop
HeyGen video generation is async. This loop polls every 50 seconds, up to 20 times (~16 min max). Switch routes to: retry (still processing), completed (extract URL), or failed (log error). If it times out, it also routes to failed.

## 4. Social Publishing
Posts to Facebook and Instagram via upload-post.com API. The caption is auto-generated from the section title + first 100 chars of script + "... Link in Bio". Note: Facebook node is currently disabled — enable it when ready to go live on Facebook.

## 5. Error Handling
If HeyGen fails or times out, the failure reason and status are written back to the Production Logs sheet. The workflow also has an error workflow configured for unexpected crashes.
